commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=794b2db9095de182b3d24fdb800018b8bd36f474)
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates Control UI reset slash-command dispatch to preserve `/reset` args, excludes `/reset soft` from reset confirmation, and adds app-chat regression tests.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +75. Total +79 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main parses `/reset soft ...` args, then the local `reset` branch sends only `/reset`, which matches the linked issue's reported truncation; tests were not run because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A contributor or maintainer needs to fix the reset detector and provide real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not take over while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(ui): /reset soft command args truncation and confirmation dialog
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes two bugs in Control UI related to `/reset soft` command:

1. **Args truncation**: The `reset` case in `dispatchSlashCommand` was hardcoded to send `/reset` without passing through args, causing `/reset soft [message]` to become just `/reset`, triggering hard reset instead of soft reset.

2. **Unnecessary confirmation**: `isChatResetCommand` matched `/reset soft` as a reset command, triggering unwanted confirmation dialog for what should be a silent, in-place soft reset.

## Changes

- `ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts:1878`: Fixed reset case to pass args through: `args ? `/reset ${args}` : "/reset"`
- `ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts:256-258`: Excluded `/reset soft` from confirmation check with early return
- `ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts`: Added 3 tests verifying the fix

## Test plan

- [x] Added tests for `/reset soft` with args (no confirmation, args preserved)
- [x] Added tests for `/reset soft` without args (no confirmation)
- [x] Added regression test for button-initiated `/reset` with `confirmReset: true`
- [x] All 87 tests in `app-chat.test.ts` pass

Fixes #91316
